articles.description: Wildlife to replace historical figures in new series of UK banknotes

articles.title: SIR heats up House: Kharge calls it ‘fraud’, Nadda defends
articles.description: The contentious issue of SIR precipitated heated exchanges between the government and the Opposition in the Rajya Sabha on Tuesday

articles.title: LPG panic booking in Delhi starts as govt's 25-day gap rule sets in
articles.description: On Tuesday, the Centre invoked the Essential Commodities Act to prioritise domestic supply amid disruptions caused by the widening West Asia conflict.

topStories.title: Iran issues death threat to Donald Trump after US president's 'Death, Fire and Fury' warning: ‘Watch out for yourself’
topStories.description: Ali Larijani, Iran's top security official, rebuked President Trump for his threats, emphasising Iran's resilience and invoking the 'spirit of Ashura' as a source of courage. He warned Trump to be cautious, asserting that Iran would not be intimidated by American pressure.

topStories.title: Assam govt drops ex-president Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed's name from medical college in Barpeta
topStories.description: The Assam government has officially renamed Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed Medical College to Barpeta Medical College, aligning with the naming conventions of other institutions. While this decision aims to reduce confusion, CM has promised a new institution to honour his legacy.

topStories.title: Uniform Civil Code may solve gender bias in personal laws: Supreme Court
topStories.description: “The answer is a Uniform Civil Code,” observed the bench while hearing submissions from advocate Prashant Bhushan, who appeared for the petitioners.

topStories.title: Trump announces historic $300 billion oil refinery in Texas, thanks partners in India, Reliance
topStories.description: Trump announces historic  billion oil refinery in Texas thanks partners in India Reliance

topStories.title: Iran War: US strikes 16 Iranian ships, sirens across Gulf, Lebanon as crisis deepens — 10 key updates
topStories.description: US destroys 16 Iranian vessels near Strait of Hormuz, Iran retaliates with its 35th strike wave. Sirens across the Gulf, 95 dead in Lebanon — 10 updates.

topStories.title: IndiGo announces multiple flights to 8 Middle East nations amid US-Iran war | Check full list of flights on 11 March
topStories.description: IndiGo said it is working closely with the relevant authorities to gradually rebuild its flight network in the Middle East. While no end is in sight for the war, whose effects rippled across the Middle East and beyond.

topStories.title: Oil prices choppy as WSJ reports IEA eyes biggest oil release ever
topStories.description: Oil prices are fluctuating. The International Energy Agency is proposing a historic release of oil reserves. This move aims to counter supply disruptions caused by the war on Iran. Major oil benchmarks saw initial gains reversed. The U.S. and Israel conducted intense airstrikes on Iran. Saudi Arabia is boosting supplies via the Red Sea.

topStories.title: Currency market on tenterhooks as Iran war weighs on sentiment
topStories.description: The dollar remains stable as global markets watch the U.S.-Iran conflict. Traders are cautious, seeking clarity on the war's duration and potential impact on energy supplies. Oil prices have surged, influencing currency markets and central bank expectations. Investors await U.S. inflation data for further direction. The International Energy Agency is reportedly considering a significant oil reserve release.

topStories.title: ‘No endgame’: Why US Democrats say Iran war hearing has them worried
topStories.description: Lawmakers say the White House has not clearly explained why the US entered the conflict, or how long it may last.

topStories.title: Iran War: Trump Claims Destroying 10 Mine Laying Boats; US-Iranina Leaders Trade Threats
topStories.description: Both sides sharpened their rhetoric as they dug in, with US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth again promising the most intense strikes yet, while Iran's leaders ruled out talks and threatened Trump.

topStories.title: SC raps govt over delay in benefits to cadets
topStories.description: The Supreme Court criticized the Union government for delaying action on improving conditions for disabled military cadets, threatening to summon top officials.

topStories.title: West Asia conflict: Jaishankar holds ‘detailed’ conversation with Iranian counterpart Araghchi
topStories.description: It is not immediately known whether the sinking of an Iranian warship by the U.S. near Sri Lanka on March 4 figured in the conversation between the two leaders

dailyNews.title: Trump Warns Of Severe Military Consequences If Iran Mines Strait Of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump warned Iran on Tuesday not to mine the Strait of Hormuz, after Tehran vowed that no Gulf oil would pass through the key waterway while the Middle East war is ongoing.

dailyNews.title: Steve Rosenberg: Russia seeks diplomatic and economic gains from Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Putin pits himself as a potential mediator but that's not an easy sell, writes the BBC's Russia editor.

dailyNews.title: Maggie Gyllenhaal reveals Trump election inspired her to direct films like feminist horror 'The Bride'
dailyNews.description: Maggie Gyllenhaal said Donald Trump's 2016 election inspired her to become a film director, revealing this while promoting her feminist horror film "The Bride!"

dailyNews.title: Special election replacing Marjorie Taylor Greene goes to runoff between Trump-endorsed candidate and Democrat
dailyNews.description: The candidate Trump endorsed in the race, Lookout Mountain Judicial Circuit District Attorney Clay Fuller, will face Army veteran Shawn Harris in an April runoff election.

dailyNews.title: Speaker Johnson touts Trump's agenda as crucial blueprint ahead of midterms: 'On the ballot'
dailyNews.description: U.S. House Speaker Mike Johnson is linking House Republicans closely to President Donald Trump as the midterm election season heats up.

dailyNews.title: More Iranian women's soccer personnel accept asylum in Australia amid threat of punishment in home country
dailyNews.description: Seven Iranian women's soccer players accepted asylum in Australia after Trump urges protection, fearing severe punishment if they are forced to return to Iran.

dailyNews.title: How Long Will the Iran War Last? Trump Offers Conflicting Answers.
dailyNews.description: Now 11 days into an expanding military campaign, President Trump and his officials have given conflicting indications on how long the United States intends the war to last.

dailyNews.title: How Trump and His Advisers Miscalculated Iran’s Response to War
dailyNews.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration to Restart Global Entry Program
dailyNews.description: The program for people traveling internationally, set to come back online at 5 a.m. Wednesday, had been paused amid the shutdown of the Homeland Security Department.

dailyNews.title: Clayton Fuller and Shawn Harris Advance to Runoff in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s Georgia District
dailyNews.description: Clayton Fuller will face Shawn Harris, a Democrat, in an April runoff. Mr. Fuller’s win over a flashier Republican showed the power of the president’s support.
